paraphrase.headline: Qatar Airways to Resume Flights to Helsinki and Tokyo Haneda
paraphrase.body: Qatar Airways has announced the resumption of flights to Helsinki, Finland, and Tokyo Haneda, Japan, starting 15 July. The expansion was welcomed by HH Sheikh Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani, who praised the move. According to the airline, four weekly flights to Helsinki will increase to daily from 1 August, while Tokyo Haneda will be served with four weekly flights from 15 July. This development brings the airline's network to over 160 destinations.
key_facts: Resumption of flights to Helsinki and Tokyo Haneda from 15 July
Four weekly flights to Helsinki, increasing to daily from 1 August
Four weekly flights to Tokyo Haneda from 15 July

gi_applied.what: Normalized honorific: 'His Highness the Amir' to 'HH Sheikh Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani'
Added local impact angle: expansion praised by Amir, network growth
Rewrote headline to entity-first, varied structure
Extracted key facts as bulleted list
Opened with varied lead: 'Qatar Airways has announced...' instead of formulaic 'The airline announced...'
